description: Style Note This T-shirt from adidas comes with simple styling and print. To be casually worn, made from soft fabric, this is just the kind of live-in T-shirt that's perfect to wear on a fun day out. Pair this tee with jeans and sneakers and accessorise your look by wearing a funky belt. Product Details Dark blue polo neck T-shirt, has a ribbed cutaway collar, concealed two button placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, print in front, blue, orange panels above the hemline and a vented hem Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm Tumble dry low Use cool iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
